Id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the plaintiff document.

Get Plaintiffs

Operator Expressions

OperatorDescriptionExample
eqEqual tox == value
neqNot equal tox != value
gtGreater thanx > value
gteGreater than or equalx >= value
ltLess thanx < value
lteLess than or equalx <= value
containsContains substring"text".Contains("ex")

sumSum of field values
avgAverage of field values
countNumber of records

maxMaximum field value

get.description: Gets the ClarraDocs Item from the system.

accountId.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier for the account.
This property is nullable to accommodate scenarios where an account ID might not be assigned.

accountName.description:
Gets or sets the account Name.
This property is a string to allow for account name with alphanumeric characters.

accountNumber.description:
Gets or sets the account number.
This property is a string to allow for account numbers with alphanumeric characters.

AccountBase.description: Represents the base class for account-related data.

id.description: The unique identifier for the account.

externalId.description: The external identifier associated with the payment, used for integration with external systems.

accountNumber.description: The unique number associated with the account.

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments related to the account.

billingContactTitle.description: The title of the billing contact person.

billingContactCompany.description: The company name associated with the billing contact.

billingContactEmail.description: The email address of the billing contact.

billingContactPhone.description: The phone number of the billing contact.

primaryContactTitle.description: The title of the primary contact person.

primaryContactCompany.description: The company name associated with the primary contact.

primaryContactEmail.description: The email address of the primary contact.

primaryContactPhone.description: The phone number of the primary contact.

id.description: The unique identifier for the accounting property.

name.description: The name of the accounting property.

AccountingPropertyBaseDto.description: Represents the base class for accounting-property-related data.

BilledOrUnBilledEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the client.

clientName.description: Gets or sets the client's name.

ClientBase.description: Represents the base class for contact-related data.

contactId.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier for the contact.
This property is nullable to accommodate scenarios where a contact ID might not be assigned.

contactNameWithEmail.description:
Gets or sets the contact's name along with their email address.
This is a combined field to display the name and email in a single string.

ContactBase.description: Represents the base class for contact-related data.

id.description: Gets unique identifier of the contact.

firstName.description: Gets or sets the first name of the contact.

lastName.description: Gets or sets the last name of the contact.

middleName.description: Gets or sets the middle name of the contact (if applicable).

prefix.description:
Gets or sets the prefix (e.g., Mr., Dr.) of the contact.
This field is applicable only when the contact category is Individual.

suffix.description:
Gets or sets the suffix (e.g., Jr., Sr.) of the contact.
This field is applicable only when the contact category is Individual.

type.description:
Gets or sets the type of the contact. 
- 1 for Individual Contact and 
- 2 for Company Contact

companyName.description: Gets or sets the company name of the Company contact. This is mandatory information when creates company contact.

webSite.description: Gets or sets the website of the company contact.

title.description: Gets or sets the title of the contact.

contactAddress.description: Gets or sets the list of addresses associated with the contact.

contactPhones.description: Gets or sets the list of phone numbers associated with the contact.

contactEmails.description: Gets or sets the list of email addresses associated with the contact.

contactTags.description: Gets or sets the list of tags associated with the contact.

contactLinkedCompanies.description: Gets or sets the list of linked companies with the contact.

linkedMatter.description: Gets or sets the list of linked cases with the contact.

contactCustomFileds.description: Gets or sets the list of custom fileds associated with the contact.

contactNotes.description: Gets or sets the list of notes associated with the contact.

ContactDto.description: Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a contact.

ContractCancelledEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

ContractCaseDto.description: Gets or sets the contract case details associated with the matter. Requires feature to be enabled for industry-specific fields.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the contract case fee agreement.

lossAmount.description: Gets or sets the total amount associated with the contract case fee agreement.

feeTypeFee.description:
Gets or sets the fee value associated with the selected clarra.web.api.Models.Dtos.FeatureIndustryAdjusters.ContractCases.ContractCaseFeeAggreementDto.FeeType.
This may represent a percentage or a fixed fee amount.

estimatedAmount.description:
Gets or sets the estimated total amount for the fee agreement.
This property is read-only and typically calculated based on related data.

notes.description: Gets or sets additional notes or remarks related to the fee agreement.

ContractCaseFeeAggreementDto.description: Represents the fee agreement details for a contract case in the Feature Industry Adjusters module.

id.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier of the custom field value.
This can be null if the record is new or not yet saved.

value.description: Gets or sets the raw value entered or stored for the custom field.

displayValue.description:
Gets or sets the display-friendly version of the value, 
typically used for formatted or human-readable output.

CustomFieldValueDto.description: Represents the value of a custom field associated with an entity.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the custom file record.

fileName.description: Gets or sets the display name of the file.

downloadUrl.description: Gets the download URL for the file. This property is read-only in API requests and will only appear in responses.

CustomFileDto.description: Represents a file associated with a custom field, including metadata and download details.

id.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier of the custom property.
This can be null if the property is new or not yet persisted.

name.description: Gets or sets the display name of the custom property.

CustomPropertyBaseDto.description: Represents the base data transfer object (DTO) for a custom property definition.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the event.

eventType.description: Gets or sets the event type.

isMilestone.description: Gets or sets whether the event is a milestone.

result.description: Gets or sets whether the event has a Result if IsMilestone is set to true.

eventCode.description: Gets or sets the event code.

date.description: Gets or sets the date of the event.

time.description: Gets or sets the time of the event.

duration.description: Gets or sets the duration of the event.

location.description: Gets or sets the location of the event.

isException.description: Gets or sets the Type Exception of the event.

timezone.description: Gets or sets the timezone of the event.

recurringEvent.description: Gets or sets whether the event is recurring.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the event.

matter.description:
Gets or sets the matter of the event. 
Ensure that the "Matter" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "Matter" field must follow this specific format: MatterName (Number).

assignees.description: Gets or sets the list of assignees for the event. Ensure that the "Assignee" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "Assignee" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial)

followers.description: Gets or sets the list of followers for the event. Ensure that the "followers" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "followers" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial)

plaintiffs.description: Gets or sets the list of Plaintiffs for the event. Ensure that the "followers" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "followers" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial)

status.description: Gets or sets the status of the event.

createdOn.description: Gets or sets the date and time when the event was created.

EventDto.description: Represents an event in the system.

ExpenseApprovalStatusEnum.description: 1: Not Submitted, 2: Pending Approval, 3: Approved, 4: Needs Review

ExpenseApprovalStatusEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

id.description: The unique identifier for the expense forecast.

externalId.description: The external identifier associated with the payment, used for integration with external systems.

isBillable.description: Indicates whether the expense is billable.

date.description: The date the expense is forecasted for.

amount.description: The total amount of the expense forecast.

description.description: A brief description of the expense.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments regarding the expense.

id.description: The unique identifier for the expense request.

externalId.description: The external identifier associated with the payment, used for integration with external systems.

isBillable.description: Indicates whether the expense is billable or not.

expenseDate.description: The date the expense was incurred.

expenseNumber.description: The unique identifier for the expense.

description.description: A detailed description of the expense.

quantity.description: The quantity of items involved in the expense (if applicable).

amount.description: The unit cost or price of the item(s) involved in the expense.

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the expense after considering quantities and unit amounts.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the expense.

tags.description: Tags associated with the expense for classification or search purposes.

uploadAttachement.description: A collection of file attachments related to the expense.

attachments.description: A list of attachments associated with the expense (with metadata).

matterSplits.description: A list of matter splits, indicating how the expense is distributed among different matters.

approvers.description: A list of approvers for the expense request, detailing who needs to approve it.

matterSplit.description: A list of matter split, indicating how the expense is distributed among different matters.

zapierDownloadURLs.description: Gets or sets the list of file links related to the Expense.

ExpenseSentStatusEnum.description: 0: Blank, 1: Not Sent for Payment, 2: Sent for Payment

ExpenseSentStatusEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

ExpenseStatusEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

FeatureIndustryAdjusterFeeTypeEnumEnumDt.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

folderName.description: Gets or sets the name of the folder to be created or configured.

parentName.description:
Gets or sets the parent folder name.
This value is required when adding a new folder to specify under which parent the folder should be created.

IManageAutomaticFolder.description: Represents an automatic folder configuration for iManage.

InvoiceStatusChangeEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

LossInformationDto.description: Gets or sets the loss information for the matter. Requires feature to be enabled for industry-specific fields.

accessTypeName.description: Gets or sets the AccessTypeName.  Default matter access type is "Matter Team Members Only". Other options are "All Active Users",  "All Active Users Except", "Selected Users", "Matter Team Members Only" (Default)

MatterAccessEx.description: Gets or sets the MatterAccess.  Default AccessType is MatterTeamMembersOnly. Other options are AllActiveUsers = 1,  AllActiveUsersExcept = 2, SelectedUsers = 3, MatterTeamMembersOnly = 4 (Default)

MatterAccessType.description: 0: None, 1: AllActiveUsers, 2: AllActiveUsersExcept, 3: SelectedUsers, 4: MatterTeamMembersOnly, 5: GroupMembersOnly

userNameWithInitial.description: Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank.The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Initials).

matterId.description: The unique identifier of the matter. This can be null if the matter ID is not provided or not required.

usernamewithInitial.description: Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank.The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Initials).

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the matter.

matter.description: Gets or sets the name or title of the matter.

number.description: Gets or sets the matter number.

openDate.description: Gets or sets the date when the matter was opened.

closedDate.description: Gets or sets the date when the matter was closed (nullable) and allowed dynamic date ex. - today+30

status.description: Gets the status of the matter based on whether it's closed or open and and allowed dynamic date ex. - today+30

complex.description: Gets or sets whether the matter is considered complex.

matterType.description: Gets or sets the type or category of the matter.

primaryOfficeHandling.description: Gets or sets the primary office handling the matter.

caseSummary.description: Gets or sets the case summary.

court.description: Gets or sets the court associated with the matter.

courtCaseNumber.description: Gets or sets the case number assigned by the court.

tenantId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the tenant associated with the matter.

notes.description: Gets or sets the list of general notes related to the matter.

adminNotes.description: Gets or sets the list of administrative notes related to the matter.

customFields.description: Gets or sets the list of custom field values associated with the matter.

mailDocsDirectory.description: Gets or sets the directory path for storing mail documents related to the matter.

docsFolder.description: Gets or sets the list of contact cases associated with the matter.

leadAttorneyList.description: Gets or sets the list of lead attorneys associated with the matter. Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial).

otherAttorneyList.description: Gets or sets the list of other attorneys associated with the matter. Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial).

paraLegalList.description: Gets or sets the list of paralegals associated with the matter. Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial).

docketingUsers.description: Gets or sets the list of docketing users associated with the matter. Ensure that the "UserNameWithInitial" field cannot be left blank. The value entered in the "UserNameWithInitial" field must follow this specific format: FirstName LastName (Intitial).

linkedCases.description: Gets or sets the list of linked cases associated with the matter.

contactCases.description: Gets or sets the list of contact cases associated with the matter.

dmsCaseSettings.description: List of case-specific DMS (Document Management System) settings.

iManageWorkspace.description: Name or identifier of the iManage workspace associated with the current context.

workspaceAutomaticFolders.description: Name or identifier of the iManage workspace associated with the current context.

netDocLocation.description: Location path used for NetDocuments integration.

netDocCabinet.description: Cabinet name or key in NetDocuments used to categorize content.

netDocClientKey.description: Client key identifier used within NetDocuments.

netDocMatterKey.description: Matter key identifier used within NetDocuments.

googleDriveLocationPath.description:
Gets or sets the full Google Drive folder path.
This is required when folder setup is Manual or when updating an existing matter.

googleDriveBaseFolderName.description:
Gets or sets the Google Drive base folder name.
This is required when creating a new matter and folder setup is Automatic.
This property must not be provided when folder setup is Manual or when updating a matter.

googleDriveFolderTemplateName.description:
Gets or sets the Google Drive folder template name.
This is optional and only applicable when creating a new matter with Automatic folder setup.
This property must not be provided during Manual setup or when updating an existing matter.

insuranceInfo.description: Gets or sets the list of insurance information related to the matter. Requires feature to be enabled for industry-specific fields.

NDASignedEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

fullNameWithEmail.description: Please Provide in the format [FirstName LastName] [(Email)] OR [CompanyName] [(Email)] depends on Communication Type (Email). For Recipients use comma for multiple entry.

fullNameWithPhone.description: Please Provide in the format [FirstName LastName] [(999) 999-9999] OR [CompanyName] [(999) 999-9999] depends on Communication Type (Text or Call). For Recipients use comma for multiple entry.

isContact.description: Set false if this Communication Participant is User

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment-case relationship.

amount.description: The amount allocated from the payment to this specific case.

PaymentCaseRequest.description:
Represents a request model for associating a payment with a specific case.
This model includes details about the case and the payment amount allocated to it.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment expense relationship.

expenseNumber.description: The unique number associated with the expense.

amount.description: The amount allocated from the payment to this specific expense.

PaymentExpenseRequest.description:
Represents a request model for associating a payment with an expense.
This model contains details about the expense, its associated matter, and the payment amount.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment-invoice relationship.

invoiceNumber.description: The unique number associated with the invoice.

amount.description: The amount allocated from the payment to this specific invoice.

PaymentInvoiceRequest.description:
Represents a request model for associating a payment with an invoice.
This model contains details about the invoice and the payment amount applied to it.

PaymentMethodEnum.description: 1: Credit/Debit Card, 2: ACH, 3: Check, 4: Cash, 5: Venmo, 6: PayPal

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment request.

externalId.description: The external identifier associated with the payment, used for integration with external systems.

paymentDate.description: The date when the payment was made.

paymentNumber.description: The payment number, typically used for identifying the payment in internal systems.

reference.description: A reference number associated with the payment.

transactionId.description: The unique transaction identifier for the payment.

checkNumber.description: The check number associated with the payment, if applicable.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments regarding the payment.

paymentExpenses.description: A collection of payment expenses associated with the payment.

paymentInvoices.description: A collection of payment invoices associated with the payment.

paymentCases.description: A collection of payment cases associated with the payment.

paymentExpense.description: A collection of payment expenses associated with the payment.

paymentInvoice.description: A collection of payment invoices associated with the payment.

paymentCase.description: A collection of payment cases associated with the payment.

id.description:
Gets or sets the unique identifier of the plaintiff.
This can be null if the plaintiff ID is not provided or not required.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the plaintiff.

PlaintiffBaseDto.description: Represents basic information about a plaintiff, including their identifier and name.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the plaintiff.

firstName.description:
Gets or sets the first name of the plaintiff.
This field is applicable only when clarra.web.api.Models.Dtos.Plaintiffs.PlaintiffDto.PlaintiffType is `Individual`.

middleName.description:
Gets or sets the middle name of the plaintiff.
This field is applicable only when clarra.web.api.Models.Dtos.Plaintiffs.PlaintiffDto.PlaintiffType is `Individual`.

lastName.description:
Gets or sets the last name of the plaintiff.
This field is applicable only when PlaintiffType is `Individual`.

companyName.description:
Gets or sets the company name of the plaintiff.
Applicable only when clarra.web.api.Models.Dtos.Plaintiffs.PlaintiffDto.PlaintiffType is `Company`.
Maximum length: 250 characters.

website.description:
Gets or sets the website of the company.
Applicable only when clarra.web.api.Models.Dtos.Plaintiffs.PlaintiffDto.PlaintiffType is `Company`.
Maximum length: 2048 characters.

email.description: Gets or sets the plaintiff's email address.

address1.description: Gets or sets the first line of the plaintiff’s address.

address2.description: Gets or sets the second line of the plaintiff’s address (optional).

city.description: Gets or sets the city of the plaintiff’s address.

state.description: Gets or sets the state or province of the plaintiff’s address.

zipCode.description: Gets or sets the postal or ZIP code of the plaintiff’s address.

linkedCases.description: Gets or sets the list of linked cases associated with the plaintiff.

linkedContacts.description: Gets or sets the list of linked contacts related to the plaintiff.

customFields.description:
Gets or sets the collection of custom field values associated with the entity.
These fields store user-defined data that extend the default model.

customFiles.description:
Gets or sets the collection of custom file attachments associated with the entity.
These files are linked to custom fields or user-defined forms.

profileForms.description:
Gets or sets the collection of custom field values associated with the entity’s profile forms.
Profile forms allow capturing additional structured data defined by users or administrators.

profileFormFiles.description:
Gets or sets the collection of custom file attachments linked to the entity’s profile forms.
These files are uploaded as part of profile-related custom fields or documents.

PlaintiffDto.description: Represents a plaintiff associated with a matter, including contact, address, and linked case information.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the linked case.

connectionType.description: Gets or sets the type of connection between the plaintiff and the linked case.

toDelete.description:
Indicates whether the linked case item needs to be deleted.
For delete you must need to pass id.

PlaintiffLinkedCaseDto.description: Represents a case linked to a plaintiff, including the related matter and connection type.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the linked contact relationship.

connectionType.description: Gets or sets the type of connection or relationship between the plaintiff and the contact.

isKeyContact.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the contact is marked as a key contact for the plaintiff.

toDelete.description:
Indicates whether the linked contact item needs to be deleted.
For delete you must need to pass id.

PlaintiffLinkedContactDto.description: Represents a contact linked to a plaintiff, including the relationship type and key contact flag.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the plaintiff note.

date.description: Gets or sets the date when the note was created or recorded.

note.description: Gets or sets the content of the note.

PlaintiffNoteDto.description: Represents a note associated with a plaintiff, including activity and task details.

PlaintiffTypeEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

plaintiffId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the plaintiff.

firstName.description: Gets or sets the first name of the plaintiff.

middleName.description: Gets or sets the middle name of the plaintiff.

lastName.description: Gets or sets the last name of the plaintiff.

companyName.description: Gets or sets the Name of the plaintiff if plaintiff type is Company.

PolicyDeductibleFeeTypeEnumEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

PropertyLossLocationDto.description: Gets or sets the property loss location details. Requires feature to be enabled for industry-specific fields.

RecoveryMatter.description:
Represents a recovery matter with either a MatterId or a MatterWithNumber.
At least one of these fields is required. 
The expected format for MatterWithNumber is: "Matter name (Number)".

RecoveryParties.description:
Represents a recovery party involved in a transaction. 
This includes either a ContactId or a ContactName. At least one is required.
The ContactName must follow the format: "FirstName LastName (Email)".

id.description:
Gets or sets the Recovery Party ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing party.

Gets or sets the Recovery Party ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing party.

RecoveryPartyType.description: Recovery Party Type has two attributes PartyTypeId and PartyTypeName. Any one field is required. To get PartyTypeId Use Contact Search

id.description:
Gets or sets the Recovery Phase ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing Recovery Phase.

Gets or sets the Recovery Phase ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing Recovery Phase.

RecoveryPhaseType.description:
Represents a recovery phase type, which can be identified by either RecoveryPhaseTypeId or RecoveryPhaseTypeName.
At least one of these fields is required.

recoveryTransactionId.description:
Gets or sets the Recovery Transaction ID.
This field is mandatory when Add OR updating an existing Recovery Transaction Distribution. .

id.description:
Gets or sets the Recovery Transaction ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing Recovery Transaction.

Gets or sets the Recovery Transaction ID.
This field is mandatory when updating an existing Recovery Transaction.

RevenueForecastRecurringTypeEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the revenue forecast. 
Set to 0 for new forecasts or provide an existing ID for updates.

externalId.description: The external identifier associated with the payment, used for integration with external systems.

startDate.description: The start date of the revenue forecast.

endDate.description: The end date of the revenue forecast (optional for one-time forecasts; required for recurring forecasts).

date.description: The date of the revenue forecast for OneTime.

amount.description: The amount of the forecasted revenue for a single occurrence.

feeType.description: The type of fee associated with the forecasted revenue (e.g., service fee, subscription fee).

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the revenue forecast over the defined period.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the revenue forecast.

RevenueForecastTypeEnumDto.description: Represents a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Enums.

userID.description: Gets or sets the user id of the user.

phoneNumber.description: Gets or sets the phone number of the user.

firstName.description: Gets or sets the first name of the user.

lastName.description: Gets or sets the last name of the user.

initials.description: Gets or sets the initials of the user.

jobTitle.description: Gets or sets the job title of the user.

classification.description: Gets or sets the classification of the user.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the TimeSlip.

tenantId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the tenant associated with the TimeSlip.

date.description: Gets or sets the date of the TimeSlip.

duration.description: Gets or sets the duration of the TimeSlip in hours.

timekeeper.description: Gets or sets the timekeeper associated with the TimeSlip.

timekeeperFullName.description: Gets or sets the timekeeper Full Name associated with the TimeSlip.

timekeeperUserID.description: Gets or sets the User ID associated with the Time Keeper.

billable.description: Gets or sets the Billable.  It is a required while creating new TimeSlip.

billingRate.description: Gets or sets the Billing Rate ($) associated with the TimeSlip.

matter.description: Gets or sets the matter related to the TimeSlip.

matterNumber.description: Gets or sets the Matter Number related to the TimeSlip.

matterId.description: Gets or sets the MatterId related to the TimeSlip.

type.description: Gets or sets the Activity type of the TimeSlip.

project.description: Gets or sets the ServiceType associated with the TimeSlip.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the TimeSlip.

notes.description: Gets or sets additional notes for the TimeSlip (nullable).

communicationID.description: Gets or sets Communication ID for the TimeSlip linked with.

TimeSlipDto.description: Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a TimeSlip.

TransactionContact.description:
Represents the payee contact or receiving contact.
Requires at least one of the two fields: ContactId or ContactName.
The expected format for ContactName is: FirstName LastName (Email).

ApiKey.description: Enter the API Key generated in the Clarra application to access the Clarra API. If you do not have an API Key, login to app.clarra.com and go to the Account Settings/Integrations/Public API to generate an API Key.
ApiKey.name: ApiKey

scopes.openid profile email: Get all required info from Auth0

tags.name: ClaimPaymentInvoices
tags.description: Endpoints for managing Claim Payment Invoices, including generation, retrieval, filtering, updating, and deletion.

tags.description: Clarra Accounting Public API enables users to manage Accounts.

tags.description: Clarra Accounting Public API enables users to manage Expenses.

tags.name: ClarraDocs
tags.description: Clarra Docs API enables users to create and update Clarra Docs.The subject API was developed based on industry best practices and business workflows, which recognise the complexity of the subject, streamline operations, and allow for user customisation.

tags.name: Communications
tags.description: Communication API enables users to log, search and read communications.The subject API was developed based on industry best practices and business workflows, which recognise the complexity of the subject, streamline operations, and allow for user customisation.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description: Contact API will be used to create, manage and track all contacts and associate them with matters, events, deadlines, documents, mail, and more.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Event API will be used for managing Tasks, deadlines, and appointments and can all be customized and tracked. Clarra's connection with CalendarRules, Outlook, Google and other calendars makes it simple to compute dockets.
